title: GSeurat Character Manifest
description: Defines a voxel character with bone hierarchy, poses, and animation clips for the GSeurat engine.

ply_file.description: Path to the PLY file, relative to the manifest file location.

scale.description: Uniform scale applied to all positions and joint coordinates at load time.

bones.description: Bone hierarchy. Order defines bone indices (0-based). Max 32 (GPU limit).

poses.description: Named poses. Each pose maps bone IDs to Euler rotation [rx, ry, rz] in degrees.

animations.description: Named animation clips referencing poses at keyframe timestamps.

parent.description: Parent bone ID, or null for root bone.

joint.description: Joint pivot point in voxel grid coordinates. Scaled by manifest scale at load time.

pose.description: Per-bone Euler rotations in degrees [rx, ry, rz]. Bones not listed default to [0, 0, 0].

looping.description: Whether the clip loops when playback reaches the end.

keyframes.description: Keyframes sorted by time. Each references a named pose.

time.description: Timestamp in seconds from clip start.

pose.description: Name of a pose defined in the manifest's poses object.
